ops.text: ccx code read --section internal/cli/ship.go labeled the 'full log' return line as 522 while native Read (same file state, moments later) showed it at 533 — an 11-line label drift; ccx code grep agreed with the stale 522. Native Read was correct. Suspect a stale tilth read cache surviving an upstream main advance (~4 releases landed between sessions), since a fresh grep after edits re-anchored fine. Cost: one wasted verification round-trip mid-edit.
